结账数据验证前: 在验证结账数据之前触发，允许其他模块修改验证数据或执行预处理操作。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered before validating checkout data, allowing other modules to modify validation data or perform preprocessing operations.

结账数据验证前: 在验证结账数据之后触发，允许其他模块根据验证结果执行后续操作。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered after validating checkout data, allowing other modules to perform follow-up operations based on validation results.

结账数据验证前: 在计算订单总额之前触发，允许其他模块修改计算参数（运费、税费、折扣等）。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered before calculating order totals, allowing other modules to modify calculation parameters (shipping, tax, discount, etc.).

结账数据验证前: 在计算订单总额之后触发，允许其他模块修改计算结果或执行后续操作。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered after calculating order totals, allowing other modules to modify calculation results or perform follow-up operations.

结账数据验证前: 在创建订单之前触发，允许其他模块修改订单数据、验证库存、应用优惠券等。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered before creating an order, allowing other modules to modify order data, verify inventory, apply coupons, etc.

结账数据验证前: 在创建订单之后触发，允许其他模块执行后续操作，如扣减库存、发送通知、发起支付等。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered after creating an order, allowing other modules to perform subsequent operations such as reducing inventory, sending notifications, initiating payments, etc.

结账数据验证前: 在标准化账户结账/匿名结账选择之前触发，允许模块调整身份上下文。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered before normalizing account or guest checkout selection, allowing modules to adjust identity context.

结账数据验证前: 在标准化账户结账/匿名结账选择之后触发，允许模块补充或覆盖身份结果。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered after normalizing account or guest checkout selection, allowing modules to supplement or override identity results.

结账数据验证前: 在匿名结账邮箱和上下文验证之前触发，允许模块加入额外验证输入。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered before validating guest checkout email and context, allowing modules to add extra validation input.

结账数据验证前: 在匿名结账邮箱和上下文验证之后触发，允许模块追加错误或执行通过后的处理。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered after validating guest checkout email and context, allowing modules to append errors or run post-validation handling.

结账数据验证前: 在加载订单数据之前触发，允许其他模块执行预处理操作。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered before loading order data, allowing other modules to perform preprocessing operations.

结账数据验证前: 在加载订单数据之后触发，允许其他模块修改订单数据或执行后续操作。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered after loading order data, allowing other modules to modify order data or perform follow-up operations.

结账数据验证前: 在订单状态变更之前触发，允许其他模块验证状态变更是否允许或执行预处理操作。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered before order status change, allowing other modules to verify if status change is allowed or perform preprocessing operations.

结账数据验证前: 在订单状态变更之后触发，允许其他模块根据状态变化执行相应操作，如发送通知、更新库存等。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered after order status change, allowing other modules to perform corresponding operations based on status changes, such as sending notifications, updating inventory, etc.

结账数据验证前: 在取消订单之前触发，允许其他模块验证是否可以取消或执行预处理操作。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered before canceling order, allowing other modules to verify if cancellation is allowed or perform preprocessing operations.

结账数据验证前: 在取消订单之后触发，允许其他模块执行后续操作，如恢复库存、处理退款、发送通知等。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered after canceling order, allowing other modules to perform follow-up operations, such as restoring inventory, processing refunds, sending notifications, etc.

结账数据验证前: 当订单状态变更为已完成时触发，允许其他模块执行完成后的操作，如增加积分、发送通知等。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered when the order status changes to completed, allowing other modules to perform post-completion actions such as adding points or sending notifications.

结账数据验证前: 当订单被取消时触发，允许其他模块执行取消后的操作，如恢复库存、处理退款等。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered when the order is canceled, allowing other modules to perform post-cancellation actions such as restoring inventory or processing refunds.

结账数据验证前: 当订单被退款时触发，允许其他模块执行退款后的操作，如更新账户余额、发送通知等。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered when the order is refunded, allowing other modules to perform post-refund actions such as updating account balances or sending notifications.

结账数据验证前: 在验证支付数据之前触发，允许其他模块修改验证数据或执行预处理操作。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered before validating payment data, allowing other modules to modify validation data or perform preprocessing operations.

结账数据验证前: 在验证支付数据之后触发，允许其他模块根据验证结果执行后续操作。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered after validating payment data, allowing other modules to perform follow-up operations based on validation results.

结账数据验证前: 在支付处理之前触发，允许其他模块准备支付参数、选择支付网关、验证支付限额等。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered before payment processing, allowing other modules to prepare payment parameters, select payment gateway, verify payment limits, etc.

结账数据验证前: 在支付处理之后触发，允许其他模块执行实际的支付逻辑，如调用支付网关API、创建支付订单等。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered after payment processing, allowing other modules to execute actual payment logic, such as calling payment gateway API, creating payment orders, etc.

结账数据验证前: 在处理支付回调之前触发，允许其他模块验证回调签名或执行预处理操作。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered before processing payment callback, allowing other modules to verify callback signature or perform preprocessing operations.

结账数据验证前: 在处理支付回调之后触发，允许其他模块验证支付结果、更新订单状态、处理退款等。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered after processing payment callback, allowing other modules to verify payment results, update order status, process refunds, etc.

结账数据验证前: 当支付成功时触发，允许其他模块执行成功后的操作，如更新订单状态、发送通知、增加积分等。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered when payment succeeds, allowing other modules to perform post-success operations, such as updating order status, sending notifications, adding points, etc.

结账数据验证前: 当支付失败时触发，允许其他模块执行失败后的操作，如记录日志、发送通知、释放库存等。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered when payment fails, allowing other modules to perform post-failure operations, such as logging, sending notifications, releasing inventory, etc.

结账数据验证前: 在渲染结账页面的 <head> 标签之前触发，允许其他模块在头部开始处注入内容（如CSS、JavaScript等）。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered before rendering the <head> tag of the checkout page, allowing other modules to inject content at the beginning of the head (such as CSS, JavaScript, etc.).

结账数据验证前: 在渲染结账页面的 <head> 标签之后触发，允许其他模块在头部结束处注入内容。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered after rendering the <head> tag of the checkout page, allowing other modules to inject content at the end of the head.

结账数据验证前: 在渲染结账页面的主要内容之前触发，允许其他模块在内容开始处注入内容（如横幅、提示信息等）。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered before rendering the main content of the checkout page, allowing other modules to inject content at the beginning of the content (such as banners, tips, etc.).

结账数据验证前: 在渲染结账页面的主要内容之后触发，允许其他模块在内容结束处注入内容（如推荐商品、优惠信息等）。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered after rendering the main content of the checkout page, allowing other modules to inject content at the end of the content (such as recommended products, promotional information, etc.).

结账数据验证前: 在渲染结账表单之前触发，允许其他模块在表单开始处注入内容（如优惠券输入框、促销信息等）。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered before rendering the checkout form, allowing other modules to inject content at the beginning of the form (such as coupon input boxes, promotional information, etc.).

结账数据验证前: 在渲染结账表单之后触发，允许其他模块在表单结束处注入内容（如支付方式选择、额外信息等）。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered after rendering the checkout form, allowing other modules to inject content at the end of the form (such as payment method selection, additional information, etc.).

结账数据验证前: 在默认一页式结账的账户/匿名身份选择区块之前触发，允许模块注入登录、会员权益或风控提示。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered before the account or guest identity selector in the default one-page checkout, allowing modules to inject sign-in, membership benefit, or fraud-control notices.

结账数据验证前: 在账户结账与匿名结账选项列表之前触发，允许模块增加说明或调整选择体验。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered before the account and guest checkout option list, allowing modules to add guidance or adjust the selection experience.

结账数据验证前: 在账户结账与匿名结账选项列表之后触发，允许模块补充匿名结账说明、协议或风险提示。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered after the account and guest checkout option list, allowing modules to add guest checkout guidance, agreements, or risk notices.

结账数据验证前: 在默认一页式结账的账户/匿名身份选择区块之后触发，允许模块注入后续上下文或客户端扩展。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered after the account or guest identity selector in the default one-page checkout, allowing modules to inject follow-up context or client extensions.

结账数据验证前: 在结账身份选择后注入本次订单通知渠道选择，由通知模块通过 Hook 提供具体内容。
Before Checkout Validation: Injects the notification channel selector for this order after checkout identity selection; the notification module provides concrete content through the hook.

Before Checkout Validation: Triggered before rendering the payment methods selection area, allowing payment modules to inject content at the beginning of the payment methods selection area.

结账数据验证前: 支付方式选择区域之后
在渲染支付方式选择区域之后触发，允许支付模块在支付方式选择区域结束处注入内容。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered after rendering the payment methods selection area, allowing payment modules to inject content at the end of the payment methods selection area.

结账数据验证前: 结账配送方式区域之前
在默认一页式结账的配送方式区域之前触发，允许配送模块注入提示、限制或扩展内容。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered before the shipping methods area in the default one-page checkout, allowing shipping modules to inject notices, restrictions, or extensions.

结账数据验证前: 结账配送方式区域之后
在默认一页式结账的配送方式区域之后触发，允许配送模块注入补充说明或扩展内容。
Before Checkout Validation: Triggered after the shipping methods area in the default one-page checkout, allowing shipping modules to inject supplemental guidance or extensions.

结账数据验证前: 渲染默认一页式结账中的配送方式列表；具体电商模块通过该 hook 提供数据化实现。
Before Checkout Validation: Renders the shipping method list in the default one-page checkout; concrete commerce modules provide the data-driven implementation through this hook.

结账数据验证前: 渲染默认一页式结账中的支付方式列表；支付模块通过该 hook 将支付方式放入结账布局。
